# Harshit Ghosh

> Bioinformatics engineer building multi-agent AI systems for genomics, drug discovery, and clinical operations. Based in Mountain View, CA.

## About
- Name: Harshit Ghosh
- Location: Mountain View, CA
- Email: harshitghosh@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/harshit-ghosh
- GitHub: https://github.com/deepmind11
- Most recent role: Bioinformatics Associate, Oncology at BillionToOne Inc (Nov 2024 to Mar 2026)
- Education: MA Biotechnology, Columbia University (3.80 GPA); BS Chemistry, IIT Kanpur

## Featured projects
- [VariantAgent](https://hgz.xo.je/projects/variantagent): Multi-agent ACMG variant interpretation. LangGraph + MCP. Six specialist agents over ClinVar, gnomAD, Ensembl VEP, PubMed.
- [CovalentAgent](https://hgz.xo.je/projects/covalentagent): First open-source multi-agent system for covalent drug design. ESM-2, RDKit, Chemprop.
- [Constella](https://hgz.xo.je/projects/constella): Polaris-style voice constellation with native English-Spanish code-switching. Built on Microsoft VibeVoice.
- [ClinicOps Copilot](https://hgz.xo.je/projects/clinic-ops-copilot): Forward Deployed Engineer day-one artifact. Three Claude agents over a synthetic FHIR R4 database. Streamlit observability. Terraform deploy.

## Skills
Pipeline engineering (Nextflow, Snakemake), Python, R, SQL, AWS (S3, Batch, Lambda, EventBridge, Bedrock), Terraform, Docker, multi-agent AI systems (LangGraph, MCP, Claude, OpenRouter), bioinformatics tooling (Samtools, GATK, VarDict, PySAM), CAP/CLIA regulatory environment, FHIR R4, Forward Deployed Engineering.
